title: Westcott E-84028 00 18 mm Aluminium Alloy Snap Off Blade Knife with Ergonomic Handle - Grey (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
Included components: 1 x Snap Off Blade Knife
light aluminium housing with ergonomic shaped handles
description: From the manufacturer We have good reason for embracing such a strong product claim: The history of success of the Westcott brand began 140 years ago in offices and schools all around the world. The producer of scissors and rulers quickly became one of the leading brands in the USA, and the first choice of teachers, pupils and students. Driven by the popularity of the brand, Westcott built on this success with additional precision instruments for office and school. Subsequent additions included sharpeners, cutting instruments, rubbers and much more. The Westcott brand stands for household and office products with distinctive design and unparalleled cost-effectiveness. The legendary high quality of Westcott makes us one of the leading providers of scissors worldwide every year. Caution: Extremely sharp blades – handle with care Keep the blade completely covered when not in direct use Do not place your fingers near the intended path of the blade to avoid cutting your fingers Ceramic Cutter The brand new ceramic cutters range offer a safer alternative to steel blade box openers. The ceramic blade will stay sharper up to 10 times longer than conventional steel blades. These are a great addition to the home, office, or garage. They allow you to easily break down boxes with handling safety in mind.
